decisions.title_en: Brockman testifies $30B stake, 2017 journal calls nonprofit mission 'a lie', Musk's 'most hated men' settlement text surfaces
decisions.reason: Story_key was published 4x (04-28, 04-29, 04-30, 05-04). Prior 05-04 title only previewed Stuart Russell + Brockman as upcoming witnesses. Today's substantive new facts: (1) Brockman actually took the stand all day Monday + Tuesday; (2) disclosed his OpenAI stake is worth ~$30B; (3) Musk's lawyers introduced 2017-2018 personal journals where Brockman called the nonprofit mission 'a lie'; (4) OpenAI Sunday filing surfaced Musk's April 25 settlement text saying 'you and Sam will be the most hated men in America'; (5) Brockman publicly confirmed OpenAI is exploring an IPO; (6) Stuart Russell expert-witness comp disclosed at $5,000/hour for 40 hours = $235K. None of these were in the prior Day-5 preview piece.

decisions.title_en: Sierra raises $950M Series E at $15.8B valuation, Tiger + GV led
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Bret Taylor's AI customer-service agent startup raised $950M at $15.8B post-money on 05-04, led by Tiger Global + Google's GV; $150M ARR in 8 quarters, >40% Fortune 50 penetration, customers include Prudential, Cigna, Blue Cross Blue Shield, Rocket Mortgage.

decisions.title_en: White House drafts EO to vet new AI models pre-release, post-Mythos
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. NYT broke 05-04: Trump WH considering EO to create AI working group + multi-agency safety review of new models pre-release; framework predates Mythos but was accelerated by it. Distinct from prior story_key 'white-house-anthropic-mythos-eo-draft' (which was about reauthorizing Mythos for federal use, not creating a model-vetting regime).

decisions.title_en: EU finance ministers demand access to Anthropic Mythos, citing zero-day asymmetry vs US/UK
decisions.source: TheNextWeb / Hacker News / The Hacker News
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Distinct angle from prior 'anthropic-mythos-nsa-microsoft' (US-centric NSA-Microsoft probing) and 'white-house-anthropic-mythos-eo-draft' (US federal reauthorization). New event 05-04: euro-area finance ministers met in Brussels to formally demand Mythos access citing geopolitical cyber asymmetry.

decisions.title_en: Treasury Secretary Bessent: US banks 'working on resiliency' against AI cyberattacks
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Bessent on 05-03 specifically said US financial + tech companies are 'working on their resiliency' against AI-deployed bank-account hacking — first time Treasury has publicly framed AI cyber-offense as a banking-sector resilience issue.

decisions.title_en: Suno nears Series D close at >$5B valuation, doubling in 6 months
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. AI music generation lab Suno reportedly nearing Series D close at >$5B valuation, more than doubling Nov 2025's $2.45B. Multiple music-industry investors involved (mostly anonymous due to copyright lawsuits). 100M users. Reported 05-04.

decisions.title_en: ASX warns Australian-listed firms against 'ramping' AI claims to inflate stocks
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Australian Securities Exchange on 05-04 issued formal warning to listed companies not to exaggerate AI's operational impact, saying it monitors for 'ramping' (intentional stock-price inflation via AI claims). First major exchange to make this a public enforcement priority.

decisions.title_en: GPT-5.5 launch party physically held in SF tonight
decisions.reason: Already published 04-30 with full coverage of GPT-5.5 picking the date, 5:55pm start, AI selecting guests via Codex, Altman's invite to Musk, and that registration filled instantly. Today's actual occurrence of the party adds nothing not already covered; no post-party reporting available at search time.
